# Implementation & Verification Checklist: Medical Aesthetics Design System

**Purpose**: Verify that all design system requirements and success criteria are implemented and can be validated before release.  
**Created**: 2026-03-04  
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Design Tokens & Color

- [ ] CHK001 Glass & Skin palette defined: surface-pearl, accent-gold, Trust Teal; tokens in consistent kebab-case (FR-001)
- [ ] CHK002 Nude palette @neutral-100 through @neutral-500 defined and used only for subtle section backgrounds (FR-001)
- [ ] CHK003 All background-to-text pairings meet WCAG AA 4.5:1; accent-gold on surface-pearl for UI elements at least 3:1 (FR-002)
- [ ] CHK004 Darker-variant for accent-gold available and used when default fails 3:1 on surface-pearl (FR-002, SC-008)
- [ ] CHK005 No hardcoded hex for surface, accent, or functional clinical color in UI (SC-001)

## Typography

- [ ] CHK006 H1/H2 use Serif stack with letter-spacing -0.01em (FR-003)
- [ ] CHK007 Body uses Sans-serif with letter-spacing 0.03em and line-height 1.6 (FR-004)
- [ ] CHK008 @status-label token defined and used: Uppercase, 10px, Bold, 2px letter-spacing (FR-008, SC-010)

## Soft UI & Spatial Rhythm

- [ ] CHK009 Treatment cards use 24px corner radius; floating price cards use Mist Shadow 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.04) (FR-005, FR-007)
- [ ] CHK010 Primary CTA buttons use 50px (pill) radius (FR-006)
- [ ] CHK011 Vertical section padding uses clamp(64px, 10vw, 120px) (FR-015, SC-007)
- [ ] CHK012 Component margins on 8pt grid; 48px Special-Gap only for CTA-to-Image (FR-016)

## Before/After Slider

- [ ] CHK013 Media constrained to 4:5 or 1:1 aspect ratio (FR-008)
- [ ] CHK014 Before/After labels use @status-label and glassmorphism backdrop (FR-008, FR-009)
- [ ] CHK015 Slider handle is 2px vertical line #FFFFFF (FR-008, SC-010)

## Card-Overlay & Glassmorphism

- [ ] CHK016 All Card-Overlay elements use backdrop-filter blur(12px) and border 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3) (FR-009, SC-009)

## Doctor-Card

- [ ] CHK017 Doctor-Card uses vertical flex with 16px gap; qualification badge fixed height 32px (FR-010, FR-011)
- [ ] CHK018 Title 2 typographic units smaller than Name, 200% font-weight (FR-011, SC-010)

## Price Display & Booking CTA

- [ ] CHK019 All price displays: @currency at 0.7× the amount font-size (FR-017, SC-010)
- [ ] CHK020 Booking CTA fixed to bottom on mobile viewports (FR-012, SC-006)

## Deliverables

- [ ] CHK021 Manifest maps every design spec and token to React/Vue components; unmapped items called out (FR-013, SC-004)
- [ ] CHK022 Style Audit report flags spacing not on 8pt grid (48px CTA-to-Image treated as compliant) (FR-014, SC-005)

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Reference FR/SC numbers in [spec.md](../spec.md) for acceptance criteria
- Run contrast checks and style audit as part of CI or pre-release gate where applicable
